docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-28-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT.506. PLAINTIFF BARBER WILLIAMS HEALTHCARE SOLUTIONS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY STEPHANIE BARBER (OWNER). DEFENDANT H.E.A.R.T.2.H.E.A.R.T., INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY J. DOUGLAS HOLLIE (OWNER).PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2845.00 (INCLUDES COST) TO THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT PAID $2500.00 VIA CASH APP ON ZOOM. REMAINDER BALANCE OF $345.00 TO BE PAID BY THE NEXT DAY 01/21/22. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JANUARY 28, 2022, HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
